summary: Tested cascade delete functionality for Investigations and Observations. All 5 features verified working: Investigation delete dialog shows 'Also delete linked Actions' checkbox, Observation delete dialog shows both 'Also delete linked Investigations' and 'Also delete linked Actions' checkboxes, DELETE endpoints accept cascade query parameters, cascade delete properly removes linked data, and Actions list refreshes after cascade delete.

minor.issue: Missing InvalidId exception handling for bson ObjectId conversion - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: The cascade delete implementation correctly uses query parameters (delete_central_actions, delete_actions, delete_investigations) to control cascade behavior
Frontend properly passes options to API via URLSearchParams
Response includes deleted_central_actions/deleted_actions/deleted_investigations counts for UI feedback
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_CASCADE_DELETE_INVESTIGATION for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cascade delete functionality is fully working. The observations.py route was fixed to handle InvalidId exception from bson. All delete dialogs show appropriate checkboxes and cascade delete properly removes linked Central Actions and Investigations.

feature_1_investigation_delete_dialog.description: Investigation delete dialog shows 'Also delete linked Actions' checkbox
feature_1_investigation_delete_dialog.details: Dialog shows checkbox with label 'Also delete linked Actions' and description 'Remove all Central Actions created from this investigation'

feature_2_observation_delete_dialog.description: Observation delete dialog shows 'Also delete linked Investigations' and 'Also delete linked Actions' checkboxes
feature_2_observation_delete_dialog.details: Dialog shows both checkboxes: 'Also delete linked Investigations' (Remove all Causal Investigations started from this observation) and 'Also delete linked Actions' (Remove all Central Actions created from this observation)

feature_3_investigation_cascade_delete_a.details: API correctly accepts delete_central_actions query parameter and deletes linked Central Actions with source_type='investigation'

feature_4_threat_cascade_delete_api.details: API correctly accepts both delete_actions and delete_investigations query parameters. Deletes linked Central Actions (source_type='threat') and linked Investigations (via threat_id field)

feature_5_actions_list_refresh.description: After cascade delete, Actions list refreshes and linked actions are removed
feature_5_actions_list_refresh.details: Frontend invalidates 'actions' query cache after delete mutation, causing Actions list to refresh and show updated data

backend_tests.test_delete_investigation_without_cascad: PASS - Verified actions NOT deleted without cascade option
backend_tests.test_delete_investigation_with_cascade_a: PASS - Verified 3 linked actions deleted with cascade
backend_tests.test_delete_threat_without_cascade: PASS - Verified endpoint works without cascade
backend_tests.test_threat_delete_endpoint_accepts_casc: PASS - Verified endpoint accepts cascade parameters
backend_tests.test_observation_delete_endpoint_accepts: PASS - Verified endpoint accepts cascade parameters (after fix)
backend_tests.test_full_cascade_flow_investigation: PASS - Full e2e flow: create investigation -> create actions -> cascade delete

bug_fix_applied.issue: Missing InvalidId exception handling when converting obs_id to ObjectId
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'from bson.errors import InvalidId' and included InvalidId in the exception tuple
